title: Recruitment Drive — BVP OSA Student Chapter
subtitle: To introduce the newly formed BVP OSA Student Chapter to students and encourage participation by recruiting interested members.
description: A recruitment drive was conducted to spread awareness about the BVP OSA Student Chapter and its activities. The team interacted with students, explained the vision of the society, and encouraged them to join and contribute to upcoming technical and research-oriented initiatives.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Discussion about chapter goals and opportunities
First phase of student outreach for the chapter
Direct interaction between core team and students
Strong interest shown in joining the society
under the BVP OSA Student Chapter.
